message:
test(wave-64): trait coverage for pipeline, systematic, linalg, entry

SendOutcome/SendProgress Debug/Clone, ReceiveOutcome Debug,
SystematicParams Debug/Clone, SystematicParamError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq,
DenseRow/SparseRow/GaussianResult Debug/Clone/Eq, GaussianStats
Debug/Clone/Default, LogEntry Debug/Clone.
